privileged_info_summary: The Nx Witness VMS environment contains five synthetic virtual cameras created during environment setup: Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, Server Room Camera, Lobby Camera, and Loading Dock Camera. The task requires configuring a receptionist workspace with access restricted to exactly two cameras: Lobby Camera and Entrance Camera, with explicit denial of access to Server Room Camera. All camera names in the metadata match the actual camera names created in the environment via virtual testcamera streams.
